untranslatable_reason: Broadening Top pattern requires multi-bar state tracking: (1) alternating lower lows and failed recoveries with lower highs (forming a widening wedge), (2) horizontal sideways price action over months, and (3) identification of formation extremes for breakout confirmation. Available indicators lack memory of prior swing points and cannot measure the widening amplitude of oscillations characteristic of this pattern. Pattern detection requires pattern state machine rather than single-bar indicator conditions.
